name: KTANE - Keep Talking And Nobody Explodes
description: A bomb-diffusing party game where you can exhibit your communication skills. Be the fastest to diffuse the bomb without making mistakes and glory shall soon be yours.

name: Integration Bee
description:
Miss your JEE days? We got you covered. Showcase your integration skills by solving integrals fast and correctly in front of a judge who probably needs a calculator themself to check your answers.
 Note: It'll be full of interesting and clever integrals and will not be an exercise in boring high school computations.

name: Anti-Thesis
description: Defend/criticise/meme your way through some random thesis/dissertation from the internet that's given to you. A jury of your peers will vote to decide if you move on to the next round. Know that there might or might not be a crown involved.

name: Balloon Battle Royale
description: You've got a balloon on your back. All you have is a toothpick and your team's honour. THIS IS SPARTAAAAA

name: Card Games
description: We hope to have poker, bridge, literature (and maybe one more game) this year.

name: Tug Of War
description: We’ve got a football field, a strong rope, and people who think they are strong. You do the math.

name: Chess-Clock-Jenga
description: Play the usual game of Jenga, but there’s a chess-clock nagging you to speed up. Can you win at Jenga without losing on time?

name: Poetry Slam
description: Write an original piece of poetry and have it sent to us. Recite it in front of an audience and judges to win the (metaphorical) belt.
